message:
Add browser loser-drain e2e test and format rwlock guard construction

- tests/e2e/combinator/cancel_correctness/browser_loser_drain.rs: New
  e2e test module for verifying loser-drain cancellation semantics under
  browser-profile execution (WVT-004 traceability row coverage for the
  WASM target).

- tests/e2e/combinator/cancel_correctness/mod.rs: Register the new
  browser_loser_drain module.

- src/sync/rwlock.rs: Reformat OwnedRwLockWriteGuard construction to
  multi-line for readability (formatting only, no behavioral change).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
